name: 9PM
overall_profile: Sweet spicy ambery crowd-pleaser: apple-cinnamon opening over a vanilla-tonka-amber base.

name: 9PM Rebel
overall_profile: Juicy pineapple + Granny Smith apple over cedar and savory caramel; fruity-woody, not a clone.

name: 9PM Elixir
overall_profile: Spicy pimento-and-lavender opening turning darker with nutmeg and cardamom over amber.

name: 9PM Night Out
overall_profile: Boozy cognac-and-fruit opening, toffee-suede heart, ambrofix/patchouli/akigalawood base.

name: 9AM
overall_profile: Bright citrus-musk aromatic-woody daily driver.

name: 9AM Dive
overall_profile: Fresh citrus-mint-blackcurrant opening over cedar, incense and sandalwood; BDC-meets-Y vibe.

name: Turathi Blue
overall_profile: Cold aromatic-aquatic with an earthy patchouli drydown.

name: Turathi Brown
overall_profile: Powdery woody-spicy with an aromatic saffron/incense character.

name: Turathi Electric
overall_profile: Fresh fruity-musky summer scent: bergamot, lavender, pink grapefruit over vanilla-amber.

name: Supremacy Not Only Intense
overall_profile: Smoky pineapple-tinged woody with oakmoss/patchouli; Hacivat-adjacent.

name: Supremacy Silver
overall_profile: Apple/pineapple + smoky birch over oakmoss, ambergris and musk — classic Aventus profile.

name: Supremacy Collector's Edition
overall_profile: Aventus-Absolu direction: pineapple-apple + white florals over oakmoss, musk, ambergris.

name: Supremacy In Oud
overall_profile: Saffron-forward amber-oud with a smoky woody drydown; Oud-for-Greatness territory.

name: Supremacy In Heaven
overall_profile: Bergamot/mandarin + green tea and blackcurrant over musk and sandalwood — SMW DNA.

name: Rare Carbon
overall_profile: Leather + violet leaf and spice over oud, cedar, vetiver and amber.

name: Rare Reef
overall_profile: Bright citrus-mint opening, green-floral heart, warm fig/dates/amberwood base.

name: Historic Sahara
overall_profile: Spicy-gourmand: bergamot/cinnamon/cardamom over vanilla, almond, praline, tonka, ambroxan.

name: Historic Olmeda
overall_profile: Woodier, spicier nighttime take on the fresh citrus-aromatic Bleu de Chanel idea.

name: Modest Une
overall_profile: Pepper-lavender-mint opening with ambroxan-woody drydown; a fresh Sauvage-style aromatic.

name: Portrait Abstract
overall_profile: Incense-vetiver-rhubarb opening over rose-tonka and a leather-sandalwood-amber base.

name: Khamrah
overall_profile: Boozy-gourmand: cinnamon/nutmeg over dates, praline, vanilla, tonka and amberwoods.

name: Khamrah Qahwa
overall_profile: Khamrah's DNA amplified with roasted Arabic coffee and cardamom against syrupy praline.

name: Khamrah Dukhan
overall_profile: The smoky evening amplification of Khamrah: incense, tobacco and oud over the sweet base.

name: Asad
overall_profile: Black pepper/pineapple + tobacco and coffee over vanilla, amber and dry woods.

name: Asad Bourbon
overall_profile: Lavender/mirabelle/pink pepper over cacao and nutmeg with a bourbon-vanilla amber base.

name: Asad Zanzibar
overall_profile: Coconut-water/iris/salt heart between a lavender-pepper opening and a smoky vanilla-incense base.

name: Asad Elixir
overall_profile: A deeper, more concentrated Asad: saffron/pink pepper/grapefruit over tobacco, cedar and amber.

name: Fakhar Black
overall_profile: Crisp apple-ginger opening with lavender-sage heart over tonka, cedar and amberwood — YSL Y profile.

name: Fakhar Gold Extrait
overall_profile: Grapefruit/pink pepper/cardamom over tuberose and solar notes with a leathery amber base — 1 Million direction.

name: Bade'e Al Oud Oud for Glory
full_name: Lattafa Bade'e Al Oud Oud for Glory
overall_profile: Saffron/nutmeg/lavender over agarwood and patchouli — the reference Oud-for-Greatness alternative.

name: Bade'e Al Oud Honor & Glory
full_name: Lattafa Bade'e Al Oud Honor & Glory
overall_profile: Pineapple-fruity, vanilla and warm-spicy woody with a smoky incense edge — Hacivat/Ani blend.

name: Bade'e Al Oud Amethyst
overall_profile: A rosy, slightly aldehydic woody-amber — an Atomic-Rose direction with oud underpinning.

name: Bade'e Al Oud Sublime
overall_profile: Bright juicy-apple fruity-floral with a sweet musky base.

name: Liam Blue Shine
overall_profile: Bergamot-rosemary-pepper opening with sea notes and violet over musk, amber, patchouli — ADG profile.

name: Liam Grey
overall_profile: Creamy black-tea/cardamom/fig over iris and vetiver with a sandalwood-vanilla base — Gris Charnel direction.

name: Al Nashama Caprice
overall_profile: Cardamom-ginger-citrus opening with lavender-geranium-mint over a woody amber base — Bleu Electrique idea.

name: Musamam Black Intense
overall_profile: A deeper, smokier interpretation of Musamam's saffron-amberwood-incense woody profile.

name: Qaed Al Fursan
overall_profile: Juicy pineapple/saffron over balsam fir and jasmine with a cedar-amber-oud smoky base.

name: Maahir Legacy
overall_profile: Fresh minty-citrus aromatic with lime — a smooth summer Sedley-style scent.

name: Eternal Oud
overall_profile: Warm woody-oud with spice and amber. Inspiration not firmly established — flagged for manual review.

name: Elixir
overall_profile: Sweet oriental-woody in the Le Male Elixir lane (lavender/vanilla/tobacco). Some reviewers instead cite Spicebomb — conflicting, flagged.

name: Imperia
overall_profile: Creed Aventus-style: citrus/apple/mint over jasmine-rose-patchouli with an oakmoss-amber-cedar base.

name: Pacific
overall_profile: Citrus-aquatic in the Pacific Chill mould (note: dated 2022, predating Pacific Chill 2023 — timeline flagged).

name: Pacific Aura
overall_profile: Widely praised near-1:1 Louis Vuitton Pacific Chill clone: mandarin-mint-citron over basil/carrot/rose and a fig-ambroxan base.

name: Pacific Aloha
overall_profile: Melon/watermelon/coconut summer scent reviewed as a Simone Andreoli Wavechild dupe.

name: Azul
overall_profile: Clean lemon-bergamot-grapefruit-blossom citrus aquatic; reviewers loosely compare to Dior Homme Cologne.

name: Ocean Rush
overall_profile: Aromatic-aquatic not tied to a single designer target; opening likened by some to Afnan 9AM Dive.

name: Lion
overall_profile: Ultra Male-style sweet spicy: lavender/pear/mint over cinnamon-cumin and a vanilla-amber base.

name: Tiger
overall_profile: Nishane Halfeti-style: nutmeg/clove/lemon over milk and rose with amber, patchouli, frankincense, labdanum.

name: Panther
overall_profile: Listed in target catalogue but not found on Fragrantica/Parfumo or any reviewed source under this name. Identity and scent data need manual confirmation before research.

name: Cobra
overall_profile: Not found in research sources under 'Rayhaan Cobra' (note: Rasasi has a 'Hawas Kobra'). Identity needs manual confirmation.

name: Corium
overall_profile: ~95% Emporio Armani Stronger With You Leather: chestnut/spice/elemi over sage with a vanilla-leather-oud base.

name: Crimson
overall_profile: Creed Centaurus-inspired: cinnamon/pink pepper/cardamom over patchouli with tonka-vanilla-benzoin.

name: Black
overall_profile: No 'Rayhaan Black' found in reviewed sources. Identity/scent data need manual confirmation.

name: Ruby
overall_profile: No 'Rayhaan Ruby' found in reviewed sources. Identity/scent data need manual confirmation.

name: Sapphire
overall_profile: No 'Rayhaan Sapphire' found (note: Rasasi released a 'Hawas Sapphire' 2026). Identity needs manual confirmation.

name: Topaze
overall_profile: No 'Rayhaan Topaze' found in reviewed sources. Identity/scent data need manual confirmation.

name: Noor
overall_profile: No 'Rayhaan Noor' found in reviewed sources (name overlaps Arabiyat 'Al Noor'). Identity needs manual confirmation.

name: Hawas for Him
overall_profile: Paco Rabanne Invictus-profile aquatic-fruity with ambergris warmth. NOTE: often mislabelled an Aventus clone — it is not; different family.

name: Hawas Ice
overall_profile: Sweeter, green-apple/bubblegum Invictus Aqua-style take on Hawas.

name: Hawas Black
overall_profile: Nishane Hacivat-style: fresh fruity opening over a smooth woody-amber base.

name: Hawas Fire
overall_profile: Reviewed as a Gissah Imperial Valley take: clary sage + fruity jam into a marine-white-floral heart.

name: Hawas Elixir
overall_profile: A deeper, more concentrated Hawas; no distinct external designer target established.

name: Hawas Tropical
overall_profile: Coconut-water/fig-leaf/ginger tropical; reviewers compare to 'Paradise Garden' (target house unconfirmed).

name: Hawas Eclat
overall_profile: Hawas For Her Éclat: PdM Delina / Delina Exclusif-style lychee-rose with pear and pistachio.

name: Hawas Viper
overall_profile: Smoky tobacco-coffee-raspberry; reviewers cite the niche 'Terroni' (OP) — target house unconfirmed.

name: Hawas Atlantis
overall_profile: Greener aquatic reviewed as an Invictus Parfum-adjacent take.

name: Hawas Pink
overall_profile: Cotton-candy/marshmallow gourmand; no clear external target — original-leaning.

name: Hawas Thunder
overall_profile: Bergamot/ginger/apple spicy-woody reviewers say recalls YSL MYSLF L'Absolu.

name: Hawas Exotic
overall_profile: Coconut/bergamot with lavender-cardamom over amber-woods-spice; no firm external target.

name: Hawas Lava Gold
overall_profile: Juicy citrus-fruit opening over smoky leather/oud/saffron/raspberry and a caramel-amber base; no single external target established.

name: Hawas Glitz
overall_profile: Fruity-floral vanilla-caramel gourmand; no firm external target.

name: Hawas Highness
overall_profile: Citrus-spice-amber over jasmine/violet/rose and cedar-vetiver-patchouli; reviewed as a clone but no named target surfaced.

name: Hawas Overdose
overall_profile: Praline/chocolate/vanilla gourmand reviewers place in the Parfums de Marly Althair lane.

name: Hawas Chrome
overall_profile: Xerjoff Erba Pura-style juicy yellow-fruits and tropical fruit over amber-vanilla-musk.

name: Hawas Rouge
overall_profile: Part of the Hawas line per retailers but no notes/inspiration found in reviewed sources. Awaiting scent data.

name: Hawas Addiction
overall_profile: Vanilla/caramel/ice-cream/coconut-milk dessert gourmand; no firm external target.

name: La Yuqawam Homme
overall_profile: Tom Ford Tuscan Leather-style: raspberry/saffron/thyme over incense-jasmine with a suede-leather base (also compared to LNDH).

name: La Yuqawam Ambergris Showers
overall_profile: Effectively a 1:1 Memo Irish Leather clone (leather, juniper, mate) — despite the name it contains no ambergris accord focus.

name: La Yuqawam Tobacco Blaze
overall_profile: Reviewed as 'La Yuqawam Homme without the raspberry' — a leathery-oud Tuscan Leather relative.

name: Shuhrah Pour Homme
overall_profile: Distinctive tomato-leaf/rose/freesia woody with a leather-oud base; sits near the Silver Mountain Water cluster but is largely its own thing.

name: Daarej Pour Homme
overall_profile: Valentino V pour Homme-style: cumin/cardamom/artemisia over rose-orris with a vanilla-tonka-amber base.

name: Fattan Pour Homme
overall_profile: Hermès Terre d'Hermès-inspired grapefruit/pepper over vetiver-cedar-patchouli with oakmoss-benzoin-amber; built differently but shares the DNA.

name: Al Wisam Day
overall_profile: Rosier Creed Silver Mountain Water-style: bergamot/geranium/lavender over rose-sandalwood-clary sage with a musk-oakmoss-oud base.

name: Al Wisam Evening
overall_profile: A distinct green-woody companion to Al Wisam Day; no clear external designer target — original-leaning.

name: Yanis 12:01 AM
overall_profile: Listed in target catalogue but not found in reviewed sources with a note pyramid or inspiration. Awaiting scent data.

name: Aariz
overall_profile: Base Aariz: a warm sweet-spicy gourmand in the Aariz Intense / Khamrah lane. Precise pyramid not documented.

name: Aariz Intense
overall_profile: Cardamom/fig-leaf opening over lactonic praline and cedar with a tonka-vanilla-sandalwood base — a Khamrah-adjacent gourmand.

name: Aariz L'Absolu
overall_profile: A richer 'absolu' flanker of Aariz; detailed pyramid not documented.

name: Al Noor
overall_profile: Cardamom/nutmeg/saffron over fig-iris-labdanum with a leather-tonka-patchouli base — a Gris Charnel-leaning woody.

name: Aristo
overall_profile: Ginger-flower/citrus opening over jasmine-magnolia-patchouli with a vanilla-musk-sandalwood base; no clear external target.

name: Ash'aa Mauve
overall_profile: Raspberry/rose/blueberry over violet-carnation-incense-neroli with a musk-cashmere-vanilla base; original-leaning.

name: Ash'aa Neroli
overall_profile: Grapefruit/bergamot over verbena and neroli with an ambergris base; clean citrus-floral, original-leaning.

name: Ash'aa Amethyst
overall_profile: Ash'aa-line floral-fruity; detailed pyramid not documented.

name: Ash'aa Blanc
overall_profile: Ash'aa-line clean white-floral musk; detailed pyramid not documented.

name: Ash'aa Oud Noir
overall_profile: Galbanum/juniper/citrus with peppermint-lavender-violet over oakmoss-ambroxan-amber-sandalwood-oud; green aromatic woody.

name: Bedour
overall_profile: Fruity-floral gourmand companion to Bedour Extrait; peach/citrus with a sweet cotton-candy-vanilla direction.

name: Bedour Extrait
overall_profile: White peach/mandarin/bergamot over a gourmand accord, orange blossom and vetiver with a cotton-candy-akigalawood-vanilla-musk base.

name: Blueberry Musk
overall_profile: Blueberry/blackberry over freesia-lavender-rose with a raspberry-vanilla-oakmoss-patchouli base; sweet fruity musk.

name: Cranberry Musk
overall_profile: Lotus/cranberry/freesia over musk-pear-jasmine with a sandalwood-vanilla base; fresh fruity musk.

name: Hamdan The Brave
overall_profile: Opens close to Valentino Uomo Born in Roma Intense with a slight Sauvage Elixir edge; warm spicy-amber.

name: Hamdan The Hero
overall_profile: Citrus/pepper/cardamom with a calone-nutmeg-clove heart over cedar-musk-amber-patchouli — L'Eau d'Issey pour Homme DNA in a bluer key.

name: Hamdan The Sheikh
overall_profile: Reviewed at ~85-90% of Dior Sauvage EDP/Parfum — a fresh-spicy ambroxan aromatic.

name: Hypnotic Amber
overall_profile: Bergamot/rose/incense over oud-patchouli-black pepper with a vanilla-ambroxan-musk base; a sweeter, ambery Aventus-adjacent woody.

name: Hypnotic Oud
overall_profile: Clove/saffron/orange blossom over oud-akigalawood-caramel-cashmeran with a vanilla-amber base — a creamy Angels' Share-adjacent oud gourmand.

name: Hypnotic Vanilla
overall_profile: Hypnotic-line sweet vanilla-amber; detailed pyramid not documented.

name: Ishatar Amber Vanilla
overall_profile: Moroccan rose/mandarin/ginger/bergamot over caramel-amber-patchouli-jasmine with a vanilla-sandalwood-musk base; sweet amber floral.

name: Ishatar Citrus Oud
overall_profile: Bergamot/grapefruit over amber-patchouli-jasmine-oud with a cedar-tonka base; radiant citrus-woody-oud.

name: Ishatar Roses Vanilla
overall_profile: Lemon over rose with a vanilla-white-musk-cedar base; bright romantic rose-vanilla.

name: Kohl Luminous
overall_profile: Lemon/mango/ginger/rhubarb over violet-jasmine-praline-pink pepper with an ambergris-moss-cedar-tonka base.

name: Kohl Opulence
overall_profile: Pear/bergamot/ginger over orange blossom-jasmine-woods with a musk-vanilla-amber base.

name: La Di Da For Him
full_name: Arabiyat Prestige La Di Da For Him
overall_profile: Bergamot/grapefruit/geranium over tonka-aromatic-black pepper with a vanilla-ambergris-musk base; fresh-sweet aromatic, no clear external target.

name: La Di Da For Her
full_name: Arabiyat Prestige La Di Da For Her
overall_profile: A brighter, red-fruit take on Tom Ford Vanilla Sex — sweet raspberry-lemon over tuberose-ylang-rose with a vanilla-benzoin-musk base.

name: Lamsat Harir
overall_profile: Grapes/blackcurrant over tuberose-jasmine-heliotrope with a musk-patchouli-cedar base; drydown reviewers find near-identical to Armani Sì Intense.

name: Mahd Al Dhahab
overall_profile: Bergamot/spices/lemon over amber-patchouli-oud with a vanilla-sandalwood-musk base; one reviewer says it nearly matches Lattafa Teriaq Intense (in-house comparison, no designer target confirmed).

name: Marwa
overall_profile: Bergamot/lemon/orange over ginger-cinnamon-neroli with an ambroxan-black tea-olibanum-guaiac base — a Louis Vuitton Imagination-leaning spicy woody.

name: Nashwa
overall_profile: Grapefruit/bergamot over ginger-patchouli with a vetiver-musk-amber base — a realistic-citrus twist on the Bvlgari Tygar DNA.

name: Nashwa Noir
overall_profile: Bergamot/cinnamon/nutmeg/bark over nagarmotha-geranium with a black-musk-leather-oud-patchouli-saffron base; dark spicy leather-oud, no confirmed designer target.

name: Nashwa Oud
overall_profile: Geranium/saffron/bergamot over olibanum-ambroxan-cedar with an oud-patchouli-vanilla base; incense-oud woody, no confirmed target.

name: Nashwa Smoke
overall_profile: Bergamot/mandarin over olibanum-cedar with an oud-leather-caramel-amber base — a Bvlgari Le Gemme Onekh-style smoky oud.

name: Nayel Her Majesty
overall_profile: Pear/cinnamon/mandarin over orange blossom with a vanilla-patchouli-coffee base; rich gourmand floral, no confirmed target.

name: Nayel King
overall_profile: Nayel-line masculine woody-spicy; detailed pyramid not documented in reviewed sources.

name: Nayel Oud
overall_profile: Violet leaf/bergamot over cedar-lily-rose with a patchouli-oud-amber-vanilla base — reviewers call it ~98% YSL Tuxedo.

name: Nayel Queen
overall_profile: Tobacco/black pepper/pink pepper over cedar-saffron with a vanilla-suede-benzoin-tonka base; tobacco-suede, no confirmed target.

name: Nyla
overall_profile: Coconut/peach/mandarin over tiare-white flowers-jasmine-rose with a white-musk-patchouli base; tropical floral, no confirmed target.

name: Nyla Sherbet
overall_profile: Strawberry/mandarin over plum with a musk-sandalwood base; bright fruity, no confirmed target.

name: Nyla Suede
overall_profile: Coconut/caramel/praline over vanilla-cashmere-milk-ylang with a leather-sandalwood-musk-ambergris base; sweet leathery gourmand.

name: Nyla Vani-Elle
overall_profile: Vanilla bean/jasmine over caramel-amber with a vanilla-tonka-musk base; cozy vanilla gourmand.

name: Portrait
overall_profile: Arabiyat 'Portrait' base (distinct from Afnan Portrait Abstract); detailed pyramid not documented.

name: Portrait Azure
overall_profile: Reviewed as a fresher, less-sweet take on Dior Sauvage Elixir. NOTE: Fragrantica's listed pyramid (red fruits/hazelnut/lychee/cypriol/rose/vanilla) reads more gourmand than Sauvage Elixir — a data discrepancy flagged for review.

name: Portrait Café Noir
overall_profile: Bergamot/blackcurrant over akigalawood-patchouli-caramel with an evernyl-amber-musk base — marketed as an Aventus x Baccarat Rouge 540 blend.

name: Raees
overall_profile: Base Raees fruity; detailed pyramid not documented.

name: Raees Aurum
overall_profile: Juicy-fruity reviewers place near the Xerjoff Erba (Pura/'Gold') family; target not firmly pinned.

name: Raees Luxury Edition
overall_profile: Woody-aquatic; no confirmed designer target.

name: Raees Twilight Aura
overall_profile: Tropical/green fruity-citrus over floral-woody-amber — a more natural, wearable Xerjoff Erba Pura take.

name: Ramad
overall_profile: Base Ramad ('ash') smoky-woody; detailed pyramid not documented.

name: Ramad Earthy
overall_profile: Earthy-woody Ramad flanker with cult following; detailed pyramid not documented.

name: Ramad Louban
overall_profile: Pepper/myrrh/cardamom/hazelnut/cinnamon over davana-labdanum-pine-cypriol with a cedar-amber-benzoin-vetiver-oakmoss base; warm smoky resinous woody.

name: Ramad Myrrh
overall_profile: Myrrh-forward resinous Ramad flanker; detailed pyramid not documented.

name: Ramad Oriental
overall_profile: Oriental-woody Ramad flanker with cult following; detailed pyramid not documented.

name: Safa
overall_profile: Lychee/hazelnut/red fruits over rose-magnolia-cypriol with a vanilla-gourmand-ambergris base — a Delina Exclusif-leaning fruity-floral gourmand.

name: Swar Seduire
overall_profile: Dates/cinnamon/marigold over leather-sugarcane-amber with a vanilla-patchouli-oud base; sweet oriental woody, no confirmed designer target.

name: Swar Venin
overall_profile: Swar-line 'venin' oriental woody; detailed pyramid not documented.

name: Uhud
overall_profile: Caramel/red fruits/rose over raspberry-honey-tonka with a vanilla-white-musk-amber base; warm honeyed gourmand, no confirmed target.

name: Royal Blend
overall_profile: Boozy cognac accord with cinnamon and oak over praline and tonka — the go-to ~85% Kilian Angels' Share clone.

name: Royal Blend Nero
overall_profile: A fresher, dry-wood-and-cinnamon flanker of Royal Blend / Angels' Share.

name: Royal Blend Bourbon
overall_profile: Cinnamon/peppermint/bark/basil over bourbon whiskey and lavender with an oak-Peru balsam base; boozy aromatic, no confirmed designer target.

name: Royal Blend Vintage
overall_profile: Reviewed as a clone of 'Old Fashioned' (some liken it to Single Malt) — a boozy oriental fougere. Target house unconfirmed.

name: Royal Blend Sequoia
overall_profile: Strong raspberry/liquor lead reviewed as inspired by Angels' Share Paradis' middle notes.

name: Liquid Brun
overall_profile: Reviewed as a near-1:1 Parfums de Marly Althair clone — almond/praline/vanilla-ambroxan gourmand.

name: Liquid Brun Limited Edition
full_name: French Avenue Liquid Brun Limited Edition
overall_profile: A richer limited-edition flanker of Liquid Brun (Althair lane); detailed pyramid not documented.

name: Aether
overall_profile: Green apple/bergamot/mandarin over cedar-petitgrain-cashmeran-violet with a musk-oakmoss-amberwood base — a Parfums de Marly Greenly dupe.

name: Atlantis Extrait
overall_profile: Orange/mandarin/lemon over watermelon-coconut with an ambergris-cacao-amberwood base — a Wavechild-leaning fruity aquatic.

name: Spectre Ghost
overall_profile: Ginger/cardamom/bergamot over pink pepper-blackcurrant-rose with a vanilla-cedar-patchouli base — a well-known Nishane Ani clone.

name: Spectre Wraith
overall_profile: Rum/spices over coffee-sandalwood-patchouli-vetiver with a sugarcane base — inspired by Kilian Black Phantom.

name: Spectre Pinnace
overall_profile: NAME AMBIGUITY: no single 'Spectre Pinnace' release found — the list appears to conflate French Avenue 'Spectre' (smoky leather) and 'Pinnace' (a bitter-lemon Louis Vuitton Pacific Chill clone). Recorded here as the Pinnace / Pacific Chill reading pending confirmation.

name: Pinnace Noir
overall_profile: Apple/orange blossom/lemon/bergamot over cinnamon-geranium-clove-rosewood with a vanilla-sandalwood-cedar base — a wearable Hugo Boss Bottled take.

name: Pinnace Oryn
overall_profile: Mandarin/orange/bergamot over ginger with an ambergris base — an affordable Louis Vuitton Afternoon Swim alternative.

name: Azzure Oud
overall_profile: Passionfruit/rose/saffron over oud-benzoin-patchouli with a leather-guaiac-amber-cedar-sandalwood-labdanum base — a ~96% Maison Crivelli Oud Maracuja clone.

name: Cocoa Morado
overall_profile: Cinnamon/saffron/cardamom over sweet dates-caramel-oud-incense — a Maison Crivelli Oud Cadenza clone.

name: Éclair Affair
overall_profile: Creamy sweet gourmand with a warm base; no confirmed designer target.

name: Meringue Luscious
overall_profile: NAME AMBIGUITY: appears to conflate two French Avenue releases — 'Meringue' (a Crème de Cuir-leaning woody-floral-musk) and 'Luscious' (a pistachio-cardamom gourmand compared to Lattafa Éclaire Pistache). Recorded on the Luscious/pistachio reading pending confirmation.

name: Essence de Blanc
overall_profile: Citrus/ginger/neroli/cinnamon over a black-tea-ambroxan-incense-guaiac base — a black-tea-heavy Louis Vuitton Imagination take.

name: Essence de Matcha
overall_profile: Orange/lemon/fig over matcha tea-apricot-osmanthus with a sandalwood-cedar base; green-tea woody, no confirmed designer target.

name: Miraj Absolu
overall_profile: Almond/mandarin/watery over civet-rose-gardenia with an oud-coffee-vanilla-patchouli-amber base — the best-regarded PdM Layton Exclusif alternative.

name: Miraj Exclusif
overall_profile: Cardamom/coffee over jasmine sambac with an oud-vanilla-incense base — a more oriental, sensual Penhaligon's The Bewitching Yasmine interpretation.

name: Moonstone Bleu
overall_profile: Aldehydes/metallic/violet-leaf over lavender-beeswax-lime-leather with a musk-honey-oakmoss-woody base — a Penhaligon's Sartorial clone.

name: Moonstone Noire
overall_profile: Smoky top over cedar-vetiver-balms with a vanilla-ambernat-leather-white-oud base — close to Tom Ford Ombre Leather.

name: Vulcan Feu
overall_profile: Mango/lemon/ginger/rhubarb over pink pepper-jasmine-violet-praline with a tonka-cedar-ambergris-moss base; reviewers cite a niche 'God of Fire' (house unconfirmed).

name: Vulcan Black Friday
overall_profile: Saffron/apple/cinnamon over leather-rose with a patchouli-moss-musk-papyrus base — inspired by Xerjoff Deified (Tony Iommi).

name: Vulcan Baie
overall_profile: Blackberry/blackcurrant/rosemary over raspberry-vodka-basil with a strawberry-musk-peach-amber base — a Stephane Humbert Lucas Pink Boa dupe.

name: Vulcan Sable
overall_profile: Whiskey/coriander/mandarin with sesame-anise over deep woods; boozy spiced woody, no confirmed designer target.

name: Zenith Blue
overall_profile: Bergamot/elemi over pepper-lavender-geranium with an ambroxan-vetiver-patchouli base — reviewed as the best Dior Sauvage EDT dupe (ambroxan-bomb era).

name: Zenith Santal
overall_profile: Saffron over chestnut-lavender with a sandalwood-vanilla-cedar base — a 1:1 Emporio Armani Stronger With You Sandalwood clone, stronger-performing.

name: Zenith Vanilla
overall_profile: Zenith-line sweet vanilla; detailed pyramid not documented in reviewed sources.

name: Zenith Tobacco
overall_profile: Chocolate/mandarin over honey-patchouli-caramel with a tolu-tonka-moss base — a Dior Tobacolor clone.

name: Zenith Deep
overall_profile: Grapefruit/pepper/mint over ginger-melon-nutmeg-jasmine with an incense-sandalwood-amber-cedar-labdanum base — a favoured Bleu de Chanel (L'Exclusif) dupe.

name: Veneno
overall_profile: Apple/smoke/cinnamon over tobacco-moss with a bourbon-vanilla-Orcanox base; smoky-fruity amber, no confirmed designer target.

name: Veneno Bianco
overall_profile: Neroli/milk/bergamot over white flowers-tiare-ylang with a coconut-vanilla-labdanum-guaiac base; creamy tropical floral, no confirmed target.

name: Veneno Scarlet
overall_profile: Strawberry/blackberry/caramel over raspberry-cedar-cinnamon with a leather-patchouli-tonka-vanilla base — a Stephane Humbert Lucas Venom Incarnat dupe.

name: Magnetiq
overall_profile: Lavender/bergamot/pink pepper over orange blossom-iris-neroli with a cedar-amber-sandalwood-vanilla-myrrh base — a YSL MYSLF take with less citrus lift.

name: Forbidden Fruit
overall_profile: Blood orange/bergamot/cardamom over red apple-peach-rose with a vanilla-amber-benzoin-cedar base; fruity oriental, no confirmed target.

name: Naughty Dates
overall_profile: Cardamom/bergamot/mandarin over coffee-dates-honey-hazelnut-ebony with a caramel-vanilla-amber base; rich coffee-date gourmand, no confirmed designer target.

name: Carnal Desire
overall_profile: Raspberry/cinnamon over cotton-candy-orris-rose with a leather-oud-cedar-patchouli-vanilla base — a candied take reviewers link to Oud Maracuja / SHL Cuir InfraRouge, but held as its own creation.

name: Teas Me
overall_profile: Ginger/lime over black tea-hedione-cardamom-geranium with an olibanum-amber-tonka-patchouli-vanilla base; tea-woody, no confirmed designer target.

name: Frostbite
overall_profile: Blueberry/mango/apple/bergamot/cardamom over lavender-geranium-violet-jasmine-pink pepper with an ambergris-vanilla-amber-sandalwood base; fresh fruity-aromatic, no confirmed target.

name: Platine Blanc
overall_profile: Mint/lime/tonic-water/lemon over rosemary-blackcurrant-jasmine with a musk-ambergris-sandalwood-oakmoss base; reviewers cite 'Torino 21' (house unconfirmed).

name: L'Absolu Noir
overall_profile: Aromatix collab 'dark' composition; detailed pyramid and any designer target not documented in reviewed sources.

name: Midnight Oud
overall_profile: Aromatix collab oud composition; detailed pyramid and any designer target not documented in reviewed sources.

name: Élara
overall_profile: Aromatix collab floral; detailed pyramid and any designer target not documented in reviewed sources.

name: Club de Nuit Intense Man EDT
full_name: Armaf Club de Nuit Intense Man EDT
overall_profile: The definitive budget Creed Aventus clone — a bright, slightly harsh lemon-pineapple blast over smoky birch, oakmoss and ambergris. Beast performance.

name: Club de Nuit Intense Man EDP
full_name: Armaf Club de Nuit Intense Man EDP
overall_profile: A smoother, deeper, smokier/muskier EDP take on the Aventus-clone DNA — less citrus-harsh than the EDT.

name: Club de Nuit Intense Man Limited Edition
full_name: Armaf Club de Nuit Intense Man Limited Edition
overall_profile: Parfum concentration that refines the pineapple-smoke-amber balance for a denser, smoother drydown — widely called the best Aventus alternative of the three.

name: Club de Nuit Precieux
overall_profile: Pineapple/pear/caramel/pepper over an oakmoss-white-wood heart with an ambroxan-leather-vanilla base — an Aventus Absolu interpretation with a Hacivat-style mossy heart and gourmand sweetness.

name: Club de Nuit Sillage
overall_profile: Huge bergamot/metallic-lemon and blackcurrant over rose-iris with an ambroxan-musk-sandalwood base — a Creed Silver Mountain Water clone that out-projects the original.

name: Club de Nuit Milestone
overall_profile: Watermelon-ish fresh-fruity opening drying to woody fruit with ambroxan and violet — a Creed Millésime Impérial clone, stronger and fruitier than the original.

name: Club de Nuit Untold
overall_profile: Saffron/jasmine over amberwood-ambergris with a fir-resin-cedar base — an ~85-90% Baccarat Rouge 540 clone.

name: Club de Nuit Urban Man Elixir
full_name: Armaf Club de Nuit Urban Man Elixir
overall_profile: A mature, spicy-sweet woody most compared to Dior Sauvage Elixir (with Tom Ford Noir de Noir / LNDH facets some also cite).

name: Club de Nuit Iconic
overall_profile: A Bleu de Chanel-style fresh spicy-woody with amped-up ginger/spice and stronger performance than the original.

name: Club de Nuit Blue Iconic
full_name: Armaf Club de Nuit Blue Iconic
overall_profile: Grapefruit/lemon/mint over ginger-nutmeg-jasmine-melon with a woody incense-amber base — a brighter, gingery Bleu de Chanel clone (EDT opening, EDP heart; ~65-75%).

name: Odyssey Mandarin Sky
overall_profile: Mandarin/orange/saffron/sage over caramel-tonka-marigold with an ambroxan-cedar-vetiver base — a JPG Scandal Pour Homme clone.

name: Odyssey Mega
overall_profile: Orange/bergamot/ginger/mint over pineapple-sage-juniper-geranium with a musk-cedar-tonka-vetiver base — an overt YSL Y EDP clone.

name: Odyssey Aqua
overall_profile: A fresher aquatic Odyssey — reviewed as a Paco Rabanne Invictus Platinum clone.

name: Odyssey Homme
overall_profile: Cardamom/neroli/mandarin over orange blossom-rose with a vanilla-sandalwood-amber base — reviewers cite Tom Ford Noir Extreme (with Spicebomb Extreme facets).

name: Odyssey Wild One
overall_profile: Bergamot/pepper/lemon/mint over pink pepper-lavender-vetiver-ginger with a patchouli-sandalwood-cedar base — a Bleu de Chanel-leaning fresh woody (some cite Sauvage too).

name: Hunter Intense
overall_profile: Bright citrus (pomelo/mandarin/lemon) over lavender-geranium-ylang with a woody base — reviewers read it as a Sauvage × Invictus mixture.

name: Hunter Killer
overall_profile: Incense/pepper/nutmeg/cinnamon/saffron/green apple over patchouli-jasmine-lavender with a tobacco-vetiver-guaiac-amber-vanilla base — inspired by Mancera Red Tobacco.

name: Ventana
overall_profile: A Dior Sauvage clone with near-identical performance — fresh-spicy pepper/bergamot over an ambroxan-woody base.

name: Tag Him Uomo Rosso
overall_profile: Lavender/cardamom over spicy black pepper with a vanilla-tonka-incense-patchouli base — an ~95%, near-1:1 Paco Rabanne Invictus Victory Elixir clone (also matches Zimaya Al Embratur Elixir).

name: Aura Fresh
overall_profile: Star-fruit/lemon/bergamot/cardamom over sage-pepper with a woody-musk-cedar-amber-saffron base — a close Versace Eau Fraiche clone (with Dylan Blue / Sauvage-freshness facets).

name: Y Eau de Parfum
full_name: Yves Saint Laurent Y Eau de Parfum

name: La Nuit de l'Homme Bleu Electrique
full_name: Yves Saint Laurent La Nuit de l'Homme Bleu Electrique

name: Oud for Greatness
full_name: Initio Parfums Prives Oud for Greatness

name: Le Male Elixir
full_name: Jean Paul Gaultier Le Male Elixir

name: Stronger With You Leather
full_name: Emporio Armani Stronger With You Leather

name: L'Eau d'Issey pour Homme
full_name: Issey Miyake L'Eau d'Issey pour Homme

name: Uomo Born in Roma Intense
full_name: Valentino Uomo Born in Roma Intense

name: Stronger With You Sandalwood
full_name: Emporio Armani Stronger With You Sandalwood

name: Scandal Pour Homme
full_name: Jean Paul Gaultier Scandal Pour Homme
